description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:0.91.0 Docker image. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the command hugo, publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch (only). Add a test job that runs in the test stage, also executes hugo, but is excluded from the master branch (except) to serve as a validation step. Set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive to fetch submodules recursively.
